task: Phase 33 — food item category filtering and supplement log pre-fill
notes: Fix 1: Added FoodItemType filter chips (All/Simple/Composed/Packaged) to food_item_list_screen.dart. In-memory filtering on loaded items. 6 new tests (2 DAO getByProfile type-filter, 4 widget chip tests). Also fixed 3 pre-existing icloud_provider_test failures — stale container ID 'shadow' → 'shadowApp' from Phase 31b entitlement fix. Fix 2: Supplement log pre-fill was already correctly implemented (_navigateToLogIntake passes supplement). Added 2 missing tests verifying navigation and pre-fill.
